prompt:
Instagram square 1:1 promo graphic for the Muha Members giveaway — social amplification / tag-a-friend energy. Same locked Vice City design language as reference 1.

Reference 1 is the LOCKED VISUAL STYLE TARGET — match its exact look: pure deep black background with a red-tinted nighttime Miami / Vice City skyline + dark palm tree silhouettes + neon red glow, atmospheric haze. Gold MM monogram with decorative crown-flourish styling. Gold five-point stars as ornaments. Cream-and-gold thin double horizontal divider lines around eyebrow text. Massive cream/gold letterpress display HEADLINE typography (heavy slab serif/display with subtle italic, letterpress texture, warm-gold glow). Styled disclaimer at bottom flanked by gold stars.

LAYOUT (top to bottom):

1) TOP (~6% from top): MM gold monogram (reference 3) horizontally centered, ~16% canvas width.

2) Row of small gold stars beneath the monogram.

3) EYEBROW LINE between two thin cream double-divider lines: "MUHA MEMBERS // GIVEAWAY" tracked cream caps, letterpress texture.

4) MAIN HEADLINE at ~20-34% from top: TWO-line stacked text in massive cream/gold letterpress display caps matching reference 1's headline typography, tightly stacked, generous letterspacing, warm-gold glow halo:
   Line 1: "TAG YOUR"
   Line 2: "CREW"
   "CREW" should be enormous — the biggest word on the poster, bold and dominant. "TAG YOUR" slightly smaller above it.

5) SUB-INSTRUCTION at ~37% from top: one line of cream tracked-out caps reading "PUT YOUR FRIENDS ON — TAG THEM BELOW" — small but readable, letterpress texture, warm gold tint.

6) HERO ZONE at ~42-72% from top: Three GTA Muha cards (reference 2) fanned out in a dramatic spread — the center card is straight and slightly forward/larger, the left card is tilted ~15° counter-clockwise and slightly behind, the right card is tilted ~15° clockwise and slightly behind. All three cards rendered PIXEL-FAITHFUL to reference 2. The fan of cards sits on the dark Vice City backdrop with a dramatic warm-red glow bloom emanating from behind the center card. Subtle gold particle/sparkle accents around the cards. The three-card fan conveys "bring your friends" — your card plus two more.

7) TWO STACKED REWARD PILLS at ~76-86% from top, each spanning ~70% canvas width:
   - TOP PILL: thin red rounded-rectangle outline pill with soft red glow, cream letterpress caps: "TAG A FRIEND IN THE COMMENTS → +50 POINTS"
   - BOTTOM PILL: same style: "EACH FRIEND WHO JOINS → +200 BONUS POINTS"

8) BOTTOM (~92% from top): row of small gold five-point stars + styled disclaimer "✦  SEE OFFICIAL RULES IN APP OR AT MUHAMEMBERS.COM  ✦" in tracked cream caps with letterpress texture.

Style: match reference 1 PRECISELY — same GTA Vice City key-art cinematic vibe, same color palette (deep black + red Miami glow + cream/gold typography), same letterpress display headlines, same dark moody atmosphere, same star ornaments, same divider lines, same disclaimer treatment.

Negative: do not lighten the background, do not use modern minimal sans-serif (use the locked slab/display letterpress style from reference 1), do not omit the red Miami glow / palm silhouettes / skyline atmosphere, do not warp the MM logo, do not omit the gold stars, do not show any faces, no extra logos, no QR codes, do not place the three cards side-by-side flat (they must be FANNED like a poker hand).
